_comment: Loop parameters that define personality through temporal dynamics.

_personality_guide.reactive_impulsive: Low fast cooldown, high impression threshold, fast mail send
_personality_guide.deliberate_reserved: High fast cooldown, low impression threshold, slow mail with high discard
_personality_guide.prolific_correspondent: Minimal fast loop, many staged drafts, frequent mail loop
_personality_guide.socially_absent_recluse: Rare fast fires, wide slow context, mail disabled
